title: T-001 — scheduler_runs table + RLS + indexes
prompt:
# T-001 — scheduler_runs table + RLS + indexes

PRD: 07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md §9.1, §9.2, §5.1.1, §5.4.4
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Introduce the physical `scheduler_runs` table holding solver run history (input snapshot, output summary, status, idempotency support per R14) with tenant RLS and the two indexes specified.

## Implementation contract
1. New Drizzle migration `packages/db/migrations/0070_scheduler_runs.sql` containing CREATE TYPE scheduler_run_status ENUM (queued|running|completed|failed|cancelled) + CREATE TABLE scheduler_runs per §9.2 DDL (run_id UUID v7 PK, tenant_id, requested_by, status, horizon_days CHECK 1..30, line_ids TEXT[], include_forecast, optimizer_version default 'v2', input_snapshot JSONB, output_summary JSONB, solve_duration_ms, error_message, queued_at, started_at, completed_at, run_type TEXT default 'schedule' for OQ-EXT-09 dry-run support).
2. ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY + policy `scheduler_runs_tenant_isolation` on tenant_id = current_setting('app.tenant_id')::uuid.
3. Two indexes: idx_scheduler_runs_tenant_status (tenant_id, status, queued_at DESC) + idx_scheduler_runs_requested_by (requested_by, queued_at DESC).
4. Drizzle ORM schema entry in `packages/db/src/schema/scheduler_runs.ts` exporting Insert/Select types.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0070_scheduler_runs.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/scheduler_runs.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/scheduler-runs.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a fresh DB, when migration 0070 runs, then \d scheduler_runs lists all columns from §9.2 + run_type column + RLS=enabled and the two specified indexes exist
2. Given migration applied, when SELECT runs as tenant A and tenant B, then each only sees its own rows (RLS enforced)
3. Given an invalid horizon_days=31 INSERT, when executed, then it fails CHECK constraint

## Test strategy
- RED: write packages/db/__tests__/scheduler-runs.test.ts asserting RLS isolation + horizon CHECK + status enum before migration exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test scheduler-runs'

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip RLS policy
- Do not omit the run_type column (OQ-EXT-09 dry-run reuse)
- Do not change run_id PK type from UUID (R14 idempotency requires UUID v7)

pipeline_inputs.description: Create scheduler_runs table with RLS, status enum, idempotency-friendly UUID v7 PK, run_type column for dry-run reuse, two performance indexes.
pipeline_inputs.details: Migration 0070 emits CREATE TYPE scheduler_run_status, CREATE TABLE scheduler_runs (per §9.2 DDL + run_type for OQ-EXT-09), ENABLE RLS + tenant_isolation policy, two indexes. Drizzle schema mirrors columns with proper types (UUID, TEXT[], JSONB, TIMESTAMPTZ). RED test verifies RLS, CHECK constraint on horizon_days, and run_type default.
